task: Wire settlement UX to backend contract and implement collapse behavior

implement: Create settlement submit flow with expenseIds selection.
Client-side validation: amountCents equals sum of selected expenses.
Group details wiring for settlementId/isSettled and settlement groups.
Collapsed settled-expense UI grouped by settlementId.
List and detail settlement views where applicable.
doNotImplement: No delete/reset/reverse settlement action in group/member frontend.
backlogOnly: Admin portal settlement reset endpoint: DELETE /api/v1/admin/groups/{groupId}/settlements with X-Admin-Portal-Token.

collapseCardGuidance.goal: After settlement save, settled expenses collapse into a settlement card/group.
collapseCardGuidance.selectionInstruction: Pick the most suitable visual element (accordion/grouped cards/timeline cluster) based on readability and interaction quality.

acceptanceCriteria: Request/response payloads strictly match contract file.
Settlement creation blocked if selected sum mismatches amountCents.
Settled expenses collapse correctly and can be expanded.
No settlement delete/reset controls shown in group frontend.
